Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 421}He seems like an interesting guy, but he's a really bad conversationalist.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 421}I'm a little worried about him, since this is the time of year to make new friends.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 421}My boyfriend plays soccer at his college. I guess my taste in men is pretty standard...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 421}He's not that good at soccer, though. He's still a third-stringer.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 421}Don't you go to Gekkoukan? Are you in any clubs?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 421}Well, it all depends on your personal taste.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 421}You get to meet more people if you join a club, though.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 421}He's really overthinking this. He looks suave, but he worries what other people think too much.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 421}I mean, I love that he cares about my opinion, but...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 421}I think I'd prefer it if he didn't feel so nervous with me.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 421}He's sweating a lot now, but he's usually not like that.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 421}That type of guy is pretty popular with the older ladies who work here.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 421}Everyone remembers his face. I was surprised, to be honest.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 421}It's amazing how many people say hello to him at shops...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 421}He's a sweet guy, but he seems to be holding back. It's like he won't allow himself to enjoy life.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 421}Even after his friend and I offered to take him to the beach...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 421}He just keeps turning us down, over and over... He'll never have fun that way.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 421}But don't get me wrong, I won't leave him.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 421}It's that time of the year, huh?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 421}Do you have a girlfriend? I bet you could get one if you tried.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 421}You can do it! Just find someone you're interested in and talk to her.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 421}Even he managed to do it, so you should have no problem.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 421}That guy is just the type to take a question like that seriously.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 421}I was just testing him, though...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 421}But I think you'd do fine in a situation like that.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 421}It's a trick we use to get the guy closer to us.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 421}Since we couldn't go to the beach this summer, he suggested we go to the mountains instead.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 421}So I reminded him, and, well...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 421}He got like this. It's so like him...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 421}I was about to tell him, "Okay," but...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 421}I was so surprised that I pulled my hand out.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 421}Did I do something wrong...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_021_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 421}Love won't blossom if you just wait for it to happen.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 421}If you want to get to know someone better, you have to put the effort in.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 421}He isn't very assertive, so our relationship hasn't grown even a little.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 421}But I don't mind, really...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_022_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 421}It sounds preachy to talk about moral stuff like this, but this is when people's bonds are tested.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 421}At times like this, when the whole town is going crazy and there's nowhere to run...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 421}I'm thankful he's here with me.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 421}What about you? Do you have anyone who will stay with you?[n]{f 1 1}
